title: ICSI – Career Consultants

basic_details.job_title: ICSI Career Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) Recruitment 2026 for post of Career Consultants. Candidates with any Graduate Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 25-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ICSI official website.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 5,000/- per month honorarium plus performance-based incentives.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
